run_metadata.sql_query: SELECT u.user_token, t.amount, t.created_at, r.score FROM CASH_APP.IDENTITY.USER_PROFILES u JOIN CASH_APP.PAYMENTS.TXN_LEDGER t ON u.user_token = t.user_token JOIN CASH_APP.RISK.MODEL_SCORES r ON t.txn_id = r.entity_id WHERE r.model_name = 'fraud_v3' AND t.created_at >= '2025-01-01'
